name: [GenAI][Order Support Assistant] Provider rate-limit spike
message: Sustained provider rate-limit errors detected — matches the failure pattern behind incident INC-2026-0621 (see docs/roadmap.md). Check quota utilisation and fallback-model routing. @pagerduty-genai-oncall
source_addendum_ref: AI Observability - Datadog Implementation Addendum, §8 — 'rate limits were a significant share of observed LLM failures'
